query:
SELECT wp.id, wp.recipeFinalId, wp.desiredQuantity, wp.weekStartDate, fr.name as recipeName, fr.components 
FROM weekly_productions wp 
LEFT JOIN final_recipes fr ON wp.recipeFinalId = fr.id 
LIMIT 5;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user AQnpkq2FC6cpfGo.root --database UyJAnBG4RdjFPnrCDJUrf4 --execute SELECT wp.id, wp.recipeFinalId, wp.desiredQuantity, wp.weekStartDate, fr.name as recipeName, fr.components 
FROM weekly_productions wp 
LEFT JOIN final_recipes fr ON wp.recipeFinalId = fr.id 
LIMIT 5;
